recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Credit
recurring_credits.description: $10 off one qualifying non-restaurant DoorDash order each calendar quarter. Requires active DashPass enrollment (6 months complimentary; auto-renews paid after).
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: you will receive a $10 off discount each calendar quarter at checkout on one qualifying non-restaurant order on DoorDash as long as you remain enrolled in a DashPass membership

_review_reason: $10/quarterly DoorDash non-restaurant credit included per existing precedent (chase-iberia-visa-signature has the same credit recorded). DashPass 6-mo complimentary excluded as promotional/limited-time. 2% Lyft through Sept 2027 excluded (% rebate + limited-time). 5% rotating quarterly is earning rate. Welcome 5% rotating Q1 included is one-time.
